payload.label: couch
payload.long_description: Partial view of a dark brown leather three-seat couch with stitched, vertically tufted back cushions and padded armrest; glossy leather shows light reflections and creasing, the front/right section is occluded by a table lamp and plants and the couch is edge-cropped in the image (approx. 1.5 m from camera).

message.content: {"label":"couch","short_description":"dark brown leather couch, partial","long_description":"Partial view of a dark brown leather three-seat couch with stitched, vertically tufted back cushions and padded armrest; glossy leather shows light reflections and creasing, the front/right section is occluded by a table lamp and plants and the couch is edge-cropped in the image (approx. 1.5 m from camera).","attributes":["dark brown","leather upholstery","three-seat","vertical tufting","stitched seams","padded armrest","glossy finish","visible creases/wear","partially cropped","occluded by lamp and plants"],"distance_from_camera_m":1.5}
